prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约16774名、19208名、16756名、25792名、24295名。2024年出现明显后移（25792名），2025年略有回升至24295名，近两年整体波动较大，2025年基准位次约24295名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划：2021年131人、2022年132人、2023年131人、2024年134人、2025年134人；2026年计划增至146人，较2025年扩招12人（增幅约8.96%），扩招幅度较大，预计使竞争有所缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在80名左右，属于中上水平理工类院校；2023年因副校长举报校长事件出现偏负面舆情；2025年有热门专业投档线暴跌信号；2026年涉及学术不端事件，声誉整体偏负面，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制作用。抖音平台热度评价为"一般"，总排名第77位，短视频曝光量中等偏低；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；机械工程、仪器科学等工科实力较强，但整体A类学科数量较少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校工科优势匹配；土木建筑类专业热度分化观望。湖北省2026年高考总报名人数约39.37万人，物理类考生按近年约64%占比估算约25.2万人，较2025年（约24.98万人）略有增加，竞争小幅加剧。；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，与湖北省相邻，地域接受度较高；该校在湖北省招生计划占其总招生规模比例适中，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次24295名、2026年扩招约8.96%（使位次数字增大）、湖北省物理类考生小幅增加（使竞争略加剧）、声誉偏负面（可能抑制报考热度）等多因素，在此基础上考虑考生规模增加和声誉因素做小幅修正。预测2026年物理类最低位次约25401名，波动区间24901–25901名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16774, 19208, 16756, 25792, and 24295 respectively. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift (25792), and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 24295, showing large fluctuations in the past two years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at about 24295. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for Physics Category: 131 in 2021, 132 in 2022, 131 in 2023, 134 in 2024, and 134 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 146, an expansion of 12 students (about 8.96% increase) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and is expected to ease competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 80th, with a stable ranking around 80 in recent years, making it a mid-to-high level engineering institution. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident involving the vice principal reporting the principal. In 2025, there were signals of a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors. In 2026, there was an academic misconduct incident, leading to an overall negative reputation, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. On the Douyin platform, the popularity rating is "average," with a total ranking of 77th, and short video exposure is moderately low. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at this university. Mechanical Engineering, Instrument Science, and other engineering fields are relatively strong, but the overall number of A-class disciplines is small.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, matching the university's engineering strengths. Civil and architectural majors are in a wait-and-see state with divided popularity. In 2026, the total number of Hubei Province Gaokao registrants is about 393,700, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 252,000 based on the recent proportion of about 64%, a slight increase from 2025 (about 249,800), leading to a slight intensification of competition. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, adjacent to Hubei Province, with relatively high regional acceptance. The university's enrollment plan in Hubei Province accounts for a moderate proportion of its total enrollment scale, with no obvious regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 24295, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 8.96% (which increases the ranking number), a slight increase in Hubei Physics Category candidates (which slightly intensifies competition), and a negative reputation (which may suppress application enthusiasm), a small correction is made based on the increase in candidate numbers and reputation factors. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 25401, with a fluctuation range of 24901 to 25901.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 25401, with a range of 24901 to 25901. It is recommended that candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (24901) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Integrated Circuit Innovation Experimental Class, Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering, etc.); candidates with rankings near the predicted value of 25401 should target Tier 2 moderate-difficulty majors as their main direction (Automation, Mechanical Design and Manufacturing, Vehicle Engineering, Statistics, etc.); candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (25901) can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options (Information Management and Information Systems, Accounting, etc.), while also paying attention to special majors like Architecture.
